description_long: This is an ornate, antique-style pocket watch with a hinged cover, crafted from a dark metallic material. The front cover features intricate embossed floral and scrollwork patterns, giving it a vintage and decorative appearance. When open, the clock face is circular and white, with black Roman numerals marking the hours and two slender black hands for time indication. The interior of the cover is plain and slightly tarnished, showing signs of age and use. A small loop and crown are present at the top, allowing the watch to be attached to a chain or fob. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and decorative craftsmanship, suitable for display or personal use.
description: An ornate, antique pocket watch with a decorative embossed cover and a white clock face featuring Roman numerals and black hands. The watch has a hinged lid and a loop for attachment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the pocket watch and the open hinged cover, with the loop and crown visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the white clock face with Roman numerals and black hands, as well as the plain interior of the open cover.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the watch, with the open cover and top loop visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the ornate, embossed floral and scrollwork design on the back cover, with the open cover below.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with black Roman numerals and two slender black hands, surrounded by a thin metallic bezel.
